title: juncus coarctatus
intro: Juncus coarctatus, also known as the Coast Bladderwort or Dwarf Rush, is a perennial aquatic plant species belonging to the genus Juncus. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, preventing the growth of bacteria and fungi, and acting as an antioxidant to protect cells from damage. Juncus coarctatus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
